visual_observations.lighting: studio soft diffused light with subtle shadow for depth

notable_visual_elements: Two gummy shark decorations with contrasting teal/dark blue and cream coloring

cultural_notes.free_notes: Playful, contemporary dessert design appeals to young demographics. Gummy shark motif suggests fun, creative baking approach typical of trendy dessert cafes. No cultural sensitivities detected.

pattern_matches.notes: Cake is sole focus, overhead angle, professional studio setup emphasizing product details
Overhead composition with minimal staging creates clean, minimalist presentation
